TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Bill_Bolger, title = Bill_Bolger, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bill_Bolger} }

S.FORM: Bill Bolger sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1931, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 8, Bill Bolger, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2009) qnxan nya sraral hiya ga maki Georgetown hopa pqwasan biru praw sinsiy pcbaq biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Bill Bolger sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1931, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 8, Bill Bolger, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2009) qnxan nya sraral hiya ga maki Georgetown hopa pqwasan biru praw sinsiy pcbaq biru. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βill βolɣer s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βill βolɣer, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qnxan nja s~ɕraral ħija ɣa maki ɣeorɣetown ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru praw s~ɕins~ɕij pʦ~ʨβaq βiru. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
